data.name: 鏡花水月
data.detailed_description:
特別感謝中文寫作MIGUO

用精美的動畫和聲音欣賞女主人公穿越時空的故事

也準備了包含蒸汽交易卡的社區項目！

關於"鏡花水月"

人類是性慾的化身，沒人可以從慾望的泥潭中脫身。
這種本能慾望最終匯流成了一種全新的概念產物。
它具有獨立的思維能力與隨欲而行的強大行動力。
它被稱爲“鏡花水月”，最終超越了時空的桎梏，
創造出了“鏡花水月世界”，並從中汲取越來越多的能量。
是的，能量就是人們的慾望，
只有你才能擊敗“鏡花水月”，也只有你，可以拯救其中沉溺於自己慾望的人。


超越時空

在“鏡花水月世界”中，有無數的女子被困於其中。
他們或許來自於遙遠過去，也或許來自於長遠未來。
通過對慾望想象的分析，你將最終掌握“鏡花水月”的祕密。
並將其創造的無窮慾望之境打破，救出困於其中的人。
是的，恢復她們的慾望想象，再現其幻想，
你最終將接觸她們最真實的一面。



Snowball是致力於製作色色遊戲的團隊。
我們將持續更新“鏡花水月”與各位女英雄的角色。

data.short_description: 將慾望破爲無數碎片吧， 讓我們來一探“鏡花水月”中隱藏的無窮慾望。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 俄文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7 SP1 / WIN8 / WIN10 / XP
  • 處理器: 1.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphic card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.12 or Later
  • 處理器: 1.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphic card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: GLASS
data.detailed_description:
Special Thank English Refine
Definitely Not Stalin & Laggy Dealer
Reigha P.


Enjoy the stories of the heroine crossing time and space with delicate animations and voices!

Community items including steam trading cards are also available!

About 'GLASS'

Humans are animals of desire. No being can escape completely from the swamp of yearning what gives them pleasure.
Such human instincts gathered and gave birth to some sort of conceptual life, into an entity which materialized with the will to think and act on its own.
It's called 'GLASS', and it transcends time and space to create 'World of GLASS' and is now collecting more and more powerful energy.,
Yes, it's being created by the lust of people.
Only you can defeat the 'World of GLASS' and save the people who are captured by their own obsession.



Game features

'World of GLASS',

It is a location where many of our heroines from various dimension of time and location are kidnapped and imprisoned.
Through a game play of a Picture Matching Puzzle game,
You will achieve knowledge, information and secrets about 'GLASS' and Heroines.
Finally, you will be the one to break down the desire that 'GLASS' created
and save our heroines trapped inside.

Patch up IMAGES of trapped heroine and restore her full appearance.
Then she'll show you her perfectly true self.



Team Snowball is an adult game production team.
We will continue to update the stories of the "GLASS" and the heroine.

data.short_description: Bring together desires that are scattered into bits and pieces. And discover the secrets of the 'World of Glass'.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7 SP1 / WIN8 / WIN10 / XP
  • Processor: 1.2GHz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphic card
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Mac OSX 10.12 or Later
  • Processor: 1.2GHz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphic card
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
